error.signature: rclpy.executors.ExternalShutdownException: Context must be initialized before use

verdict.summary: Node shutdown was triggered externally (Ctrl+C) while the executor was spinning. Context is no longer valid.

dead_ends.action: Catch the exception and keep spinning
dead_ends.why_fails: Context is already destroyed; continued spinning causes undefined behavior and potential segfault
Multiple init/shutdown cycles are fragile and leak resources in many RMW implementations

workarounds.action: Wrap spin in try/except for graceful shutdown
workarounds.how: try: rclpy.spin(node) except (KeyboardInterrupt, ExternalShutdownException): pass finally: node.destroy_node(); rclpy.try_shutdown()

workarounds.action: Use rclpy.try_shutdown() instead of rclpy.shutdown() for safe cleanup
Register an on_shutdown callback for resource cleanup
